global.description: The ad features a minimalist design showcasing a new product collection with a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a new product collection available for a limited time.

elements.label: light gray background
elements.description: A light gray background fills the entire canvas, providing a neutral base for the other elements.

elements.label: two product outlines
elements.description: Two outlined rectangles representing products are centered, with a minimalist design and no color fill.

elements.label: three circular product icons
elements.description: Three small circular icons are centered below the product outlines, suggesting additional product options.

elements.label: small sale badge
elements.description: A small rectangular badge with the word 'SALE' in bold text, positioned at the top left corner.

elements.label: ZenDrop logo
elements.description: The logo 'ZenDrop' is displayed prominently at the top center in a bold, modern font.

elements.label: headline text
elements.description: The headline reads 'New collection drop Only this weekend' in large, bold font, centered in the lower half.
elements.text_content: New collection drop Only this weekend

elements.label: call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom center with the text 'Learn more' in bold, inviting font.

elements.label: price text
elements.description: The price '€29.99' is displayed in a bold font, centered below the headline and above the CTA.

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: A small icon labeled 'UGC' is positioned at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with bold text, promoting a new collection.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top center, the headline is in the lower half, and the CTA is at the bottom center.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: New collection drop Only this weekend, €29.99 Learn more, ZenDrop, SALE, UGC
